news.t: Defiance ETFs Launches DAMD: the First 2X Short ETF of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short AMD ETF (DAMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (Nasdaq: AMD), less fees and expenses. DAMD was launched on Nov 13, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance ETFs Launches DAMD: the First 2X Short ETF of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
